burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate due to injuries and hospitalizations
burden.mortalityRate: Low overall; higher when cardiac causes

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: History and physical exam, orthostatic BP, ECG; further testing (Holter, tilt test) when indicated

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: no screening; evaluated in urgent care
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; depends on access to cardiac evaluation

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: ECG available widely; advanced testing concentrated in referral centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Treat underlying cause; hydration and medication review; pacemaker for conduction disease
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited access to tilt-table testing and long-term rhythm monitoring
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Emergency protocols and cardiology referral pathways in SUS
